The '''Battle of Ko Vari''' took place during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]].

==The battle==
Not much is known about the battle, only that it apparently involved the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] fighting against the [[Krath/Legends|Krath]], within [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]]. With the [[Assassinations in the Nyssa system|emergence]] of a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] cult in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]], the Krath signed a non-aggression pact with the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]]. In response, Republic forces launched a raid on Ko Vari which obliterated the orbiting Krath fleet and devastated much of the planet's surface, depopulating it.
